brief:
• Ensure all trades have a well-defined thesis and clear catalysts before execution to avoid ambiguity.  
• Conduct thorough risk assessments to prevent entering positions without solid rationale.  
• Develop a structured pipeline for trade justification, especially in adverse macro conditions.  
• Monitor agent reliability and performance patterns to identify consistent weaknesses in trade execution.  
• Reassess setup types that have historically failed to refine future trading strategies.
